case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS SIMPSON, DEBORAH M.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $787.25 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, DEBORAH M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, DEBORAH M.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMPSON, DEBORAH M. $787.25 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $829.25, $50.00 PER MONTH THRU 3/30/94. APRIL 30,1994 $20.00 PER MONTH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PETITION TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR.
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $27.04 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, DEBORAH M.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, DEBORAH M.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $899.15 AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, DEBORAH M.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, DEBORAH M.
